queue.title: Add --fast mode to account test with 3s timeout for health checks

outcome.note: Added --fast flag to account-manager.mjs test/live/json commands. Uses 3s timeout (vs 8s default). Passes through testAccount→safeFetch. 12/12 tests pass.

queue.title: Add backup substitution telemetry field to engagement-trace.json
Add TODO tracker false-positive rate metric to audit reporting
Add auto-promote hook: brainstorming→queue when pending < 4
queue.description: d073 deliverable 1: Create a pre-session hook (or extend existing) that checks queue pending count and auto-promotes the oldest non-struck-through brainstorming idea when count drops below 4. Must apply the same quality gate as manual promotion (not duplicate, actionable, scoped to 1-2 B sessions). Should run for all session types so the queue never starves between R sessions.
